hero.title: About SkillBoost
hero.subtitle: Empowering learners worldwide to master English and achieve their dreams

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Founded in 2020, SkillBoost was born from a simple yet powerful vision: bring high-quality English education to everyone, regardless of location or background.
story.p2: Starting as a small, passionate team, we have grown into a global platform serving thousands of learners across more than 50 countries. Our commitment to quality and student success has never wavered.
story.p3: Today, we continue to innovate and refine our courses to ensure every learner gets the best possible learning experience. Join us on the journey to mastering English.

values.title: Core values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Bring quality English education to everyone, everywhere, and empower learners to reach their goals.
